name: io.github.omniologynow-rgb/profitspot-mcp
title: ProfitSpot MCP — The DeFi Brain for AI Agents
description: The DeFi Brain for AI agents — risk-scored yields, Monte Carlo profit simulation, impermanent loss calculator, and whale tracking across 86 chains and 6,500+ liquidity pools. Give Claude or any LLM the power to analyze DeFi like a quant. Free tier available, no API key needed. Install: pip install profitspot-mcp
